title: stipa pulcherrima subsp. grafiana
intro: Stipa pulcherrima subsp. grafiana, also known as Grafiana Feathertop or Mexican Gold, is a sub-species of the Stipa pulcherrima plant, a type of ornamental grass native to Mexico. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stipa pulcherrima subsp. grafiana include reducing inflammation, relieving sinus pressure, and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
